name: Garden Fresh Combo
recipeIngredient: 4 cups sliced zucchini or summer squash
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine all ingredients except for the tomatoes and parmesan cheese.
2. Cover the skillet loosely and cook on medium heat for about 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender. Stir occasionally.
3. Add the tomatoes and grate
parmesan cheese to the skillet.
4. Cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes, or until the mixture is heated through.
5. Serve immediately.
